name: EverETH Reflect
description: EverETH is a smart contract protocol that implements an automated dividend distribution mechanism for token holders, where rewards are paid in Ethereum and derived from the transaction tax and on-chain trading volume. The contract tracks holder balances and proportionally allocates and transfers dividends without requiring manual claims or staking functions. The EverETH token is deployed on Binance Smart Chain and is available for trading on PancakeSwap, with the primary liquidity and trading pair being EverETH/BNB. The protocol is designed to operate autonomously through its contract logic, with dividend processing and distribution handled at the smart contract level.
